customers_say: Customers find the water purifier to be of good quality, working well, and appreciate its quick and professional installation by Aquaguard experts. The product offers excellent value for money, tastes good, and features an elegant design. Customers find it easy to use, with one mentioning the tap design makes water collection convenient. The service receives mixed reviews, with some customers praising the service while others report poor service experiences.

reviews.author: Harini Kapila
reviews.title: Good water filter with 12 stages
reviews.body: Service is good, tank fills quickly and water wastage is less. Dont have to change Filter till 10 K Liters is more exciting for me

reviews.author: Gautham skoyal
reviews.title: Hey
reviews.body: Working good and fine ... installation was smooth and the product looks classy ..water feels premium

reviews.author: Vidya
reviews.title: Good
reviews.body: It looks good. Product is good
